title: API Recognition for multiple boards connected in one connected column
excerpt: Hello! Does anyone know if there there a way for the API to recognize the item id of a linked column if the column is connected to multiple boards? It seems the API can only query the item id(s) if the connected board co…

posts.author: jlivingston (Jordan Livingston)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Does anyone know if there there a way for the API to recognize the item id of a linked column if the column is connected to multiple boards? It seems the API can only query the item id(s) if the connected board column is linked to a single board only. See example pictures using Make.com
